title: Mellow Peppery Uruguayan Ikura Bake
description: Experience the unique combination of Uruguayan flavors with the added richness of ikura and beurre-monte.
instructions: Rinse the ikura under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the beurre-monte, garlic powder, dried oregano, and salt.
Add the chopped parsley to the bowl and mix until combined.
In a separate bowl, mix the brown rice with the black pepper.
In a small baking dish, create a layer of the brown rice mixture.
Top the rice with a layer of the ikura, followed by a drizzle of the beurre-monte mixture.
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of rice.
Drizzle the extra virgin olive oil over the top of the dish.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
